full_text:
Zhi Xi (Yuansheng)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhi Xi, styledYuansheng, was born in Jingzhao. Court Physician, warned his friend Kong Rong about angering Cao Cao. Mourned his death. Zhi Xi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
